tokenSync.label: Proxy Token

geo.title: Country-targeted pull
geo.gatewayHint: Pre-filled for the Long-Acting ISP plan (isp.smartproxy.net:3100). If your smartproxy.org dashboard → Proxy Setup shows a different host:port, paste it here to override.
geo.apiUrlLabel: API URL — required, from your dashboard
geo.apiUrlHintBefore: Paste the URL from your ShopSocks5 dashboard → SOCKS5 API guide. It already contains your token. Put
geo.apiUrlHintAfter: where the country code belongs to filter by the selection above.

rotating.bdpmDesc: Select only when utilizing a Bright Data BDPM proxy configuration path.
rotating.tip: Tip: a rotating gateway uses the same host:port for every session — your username/password (or sticky-session token) selects the exit IP.

apiSync.title: API Sync
apiSync.brightDataHelp: Pulls the zone's routable IPs via {{provider}}'s API and pins each to the super-proxy gateway using the username & password above.
apiSync.verifyAfter: above against the {{provider}} gateway with a live request, then adds the working endpoint.

result.simulation: Simulation: these entries demonstrate the sync pipeline. Live vendor-API wiring drops in behind the same flow.

errors.enterProviderToken: Enter your provider token to sync.
errors.enterUsernameFirst: Enter the proxy username above first.

geoHints.apify: Apify residential routes through one gateway (proxy.apify.com:8000); the country and a sticky session are encoded into the username. Each pull mints that many sticky residential IPs you can assign to profiles. Use the password from Apify Console → Proxy → HTTP settings.
geoHints.smartproxyorg: Smartproxy.org (Long-Acting ISP) routes through isp.smartproxy.net:3100 and embeds area (country) + optional state/city + a sticky lifetime/session into the proxy username. Enter your sub-account username (smart-…) and its password. "Keep same IP" sets how long one exit IP stays fixed (5 min up to 24 h); leave it on "Different each time" with a blank session to mint several rotating IPs. If your dashboard shows a different host:port, override it below.
geoHints.shopsocks5: ShopSocks5 pulls your purchased SOCKS5 (or HTTPS) list via its API, filtered to the chosen country/state/city. The API authenticates with your account username/email + API token TOGETHER — token alone returns “User or Api Token incorrect”. Pick the Plan that matches your subscription (Premium / List / Daily).
